basic.question_text: 查询**没有分配建筑**的员工姓名和角色。
basic.question_context: 使用 WHERE building IS NULL。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT name, role FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;
hints: WHERE building IS NULL 查找 building 为空的记录
SELECT name, role FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;
SELECT name, role FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;

basic.question_text: 查询**已分配建筑**的员工姓名和建筑。
basic.question_context: 使用 WHERE building IS NOT NULL。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT name, building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;
hints: IS NOT NULL 查找非空值
SELECT name, building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;
SELECT name, building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL;

basic.question_text: 查询**没有员工的建筑**的名称（使用 LEFT JOIN + IS NULL）。
basic.question_context: LEFT JOIN + WHERE employees.name IS NULL。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT building_name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE employees.name IS NULL;
accept_alternatives: SELECT building_name FROM buildings WHERE building_name NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT building FROM employees WHERE building IS NOT NULL);
hints: LEFT JOIN 保留所有建筑，WHERE name IS NULL 筛选无员工的
SELECT building_name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE name IS NULL;
SELECT building_name FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building WHERE name IS NULL;

basic.question_text: 查询工作年限**为 0** 的员工姓名。
basic.question_context: WHERE years_employed = 0（注意：NULL 和 0 不同！）。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT name FROM employees WHERE years_employed = 0;
hints: NULL 和 0 是不同的！years_employed = 0 是明确的0值
SELECT name FROM employees WHERE years_employed = 0;
SELECT name FROM employees WHERE years_employed = 0;

basic.question_text: 查询所有员工中**building 的 NULL 值有多少个**。
basic.question_context: COUNT(*) - COUNT(building) 或 SUM(CASE WHEN building IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;
hints: COUNT(building) 会忽略 NULL，所以 COUNT(*) - COUNT(building) = NULL 数量
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees WHERE building IS NULL;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**每栋建筑中 NULL 角色（或未分配角色）的员工数**。提示：角色不会是 NULL，但可以用其他方式练习。改为查询每栋建筑的平均工作年限，**不包含未分配建筑的员工**。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, AVG(years_employed) AS avg_years FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name;
hints: INNER JOIN 自然排除了没有建筑的员工
SELECT building_name, AVG(years_employed) FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name;
SELECT building_name, AVG(years_employed) FROM buildings INNER JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name;

intermediate.question_text: 使用 COALESCE 函数，查询所有员工的姓名和建筑，**建筑为 NULL 时显示 '未分配'**。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT name, COALESCE(building, '未分配') AS building FROM employees;
hints: COALESCE(列, 替代值) 当列为 NULL 时返回替代值
SELECT name, COALESCE(building, '未分配') FROM employees;
SELECT name, COALESCE(building, '未分配') FROM employees;

intermediate.question_text: 查询员工总数、已分配建筑的人数、未分配建筑的人数。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(building) AS assigned, COUNT(*) - COUNT(building) AS unassigned FROM employees;
hints: COUNT(building) 忽略 NULL
SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(building), COUNT(*) - COUNT(building) FROM employees;
SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(building), COUNT(*) - COUNT(building) FROM employees;

intermediate.question_text: 查询每栋建筑的**容量利用率**（员工数/容量 × 100%），用 LEFT JOIN 包含空建筑。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT building_name, capacity, COUNT(name) AS occupied, ROUND(COUNT(name) * 100.0 / capacity, 1) AS usage_pct FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building GROUP BY building_name;
hints: COUNT(name) * 100.0 / capacity 计算利用率
SELECT building_name, ROUND(COUNT(name)*100.0/capacity, 1) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name=building GROUP BY building_name;
SELECT building_name, ROUND(COUNT(name)*100.0/capacity, 1) FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name=building GROUP BY building_name;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**比平均工作年限长**的员工姓名和年限。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed > (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees);
hints: WHERE years_employed > (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees)
SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed > (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees);
SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed > (SELECT AVG(years_employed) FROM employees);

challenge.question_text: 查询工作年限为 NULL 或为 0 的员工（用 OR 连接）。
challenge.question_context: NULL 和 0 是不同的概念，但有时都代表'无经验'。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed IS NULL OR years_employed = 0;
hints: IS NULL OR = 0
SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed IS NULL OR years_employed = 0;
SELECT name, years_employed FROM employees WHERE years_employed IS NULL OR years_employed = 0;

challenge.question_text: 查询所有建筑，如果建筑有员工则显示'有员工'，没有则显示'空置'。用 CASE WHEN。
challenge.question_context: LEFT JOIN + CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN '空置' ELSE '有员工' END。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT building_name, CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN '空置' ELSE '有员工' END AS status FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name = building;
hints: CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN '空置' ELSE '有员工' END
SELECT DISTINCT building_name, CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN '空置' ELSE '有员工' END FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name=building;
SELECT DISTINCT building_name, CASE WHEN name IS NULL THEN '空置' ELSE '有员工' END FROM buildings LEFT JOIN employees ON building_name=building;
